gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用错位语音留言编织的浪漫奇遇，笑中带泪的治愈系小品。
gems.whyWatchEn: A charming romantic comedy built on misdirected voicemails, blending laughter and tears into a truly original love story.
gems.audience: 喜爱非传统浪漫故事、对语音时代有怀旧感的观众，以及寻找轻松治愈体验的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of unconventional romance, those nostalgic for the voicemail era, and viewers seeking a lighthearted yet touching cinematic escape.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP大胆拥抱数字时代，用科技玩具的萌趣对决引发童年反思。
gems.whyWatchEn: Boldly tackles the digital age by pitting classic toys against tech gadgets, delivering both nostalgia and a thoughtful message about play.
gems.audience: 皮克斯粉丝、陪伴孩子成长的家长，以及关注数字时代育儿议题的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Pixar fans, parents navigating their children's digital play, and anyone interested in how technology reshapes childhood.
